title: Notification No.125/2015-Cus(NT), dated 24.11.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 125/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 24th November, 2015 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and Sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Kolkata to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on - (i) the Additional Commissioner of Customs, (Air Cargo Complex), 15/1, Strand Road, Custom House, Kolkata-700001; (ii) the Additional Commissioner of Customs, Kolkata-700001, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s JMT Auto Limited, Plot No. C-19/20, D/2,3, NS-35 (P) 7th Phase, Industrial Area, Adityapur, Jamshedpur-832109 and others issued vide Show Cause Notice number. 718(ii)11/Comr/PRU/2011-12, dated 31st December, 2012 by the Additional Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Lucknow Zonal Unit, Lucknow. [F No.437/56/2015-Cus.IV] (Z.R.Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
